ALCHEMIST-GAMBIT.title: Gambit
ALCHEMIST-GAMBIT.description: While you are at 50% or less HP, this card has an extra effect.
ALCHEMIST-FERMENT.title: Ferment
ALCHEMIST-FERMENT.description: This card's effect grows for each turn it stays in your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-SEEP.title: Seep
ALCHEMIST-SEEP.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], an extra effect triggers.
ALCHEMIST-INFUSE.title: Infuse
ALCHEMIST-INFUSE.description: [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card until the end of combat. Attacks gain [blue]2[/blue] [purple]Sharp[/purple], Skills gain [blue]2[/blue] [purple]Adroit[/purple], Powers gain [blue]2[/blue] [purple]Swift[/purple]. Other cards gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold]. You can [gold]Infuse[/gold] a card multiple times.
